chat.disclaimer: Answers are based exclusively on your documentation

empty.title: Ask about your documentation
empty.subtitleReady: Type any question and I'll find the answer.
empty.subtitleNoDocuments: Connect Google Drive or upload documents to get started.

sidebar.uploadLocked: {email} is uploading a document right now
sidebar.uploadLockHelp: Only one user can upload at a time to avoid conflicts
sidebar.uploadError423: Another user is uploading. Try again in a few minutes.
sidebar.lockedBanner: {lockedBy} is analyzing documents. Uploads are temporarily locked.
sidebar.lockReminderMsg: You have uploads locked. If you are done analyzing, unlock for your teammates.
sidebar.lockedByOtherAlert: The lock was set by {name}. Only that person or an admin can unlock it.
sidebar.lockedByOtherConfirm: Uploads are locked by {name}. Wait until they finish analyzing.
sidebar.modalActiveTooltip: An analysis or improvement session is active. Finish it before continuing.

analysis.cannotLocate: Could not locate the exact fragment in the text.
analysis.exhaustiveRunning: The deep analysis is running. You will receive results when it finishes.
analysis.exhaustiveQueue: In queue. Analysis will take a few minutes.
analysis.exhaustiveDesc: Analyzes the entire corpus in greater depth. Cost: 30 credits.
analysis.variablePricingNote: With your plan, the final cost may be lower.
analysis.reanalysisNote: Re-analysis compares again against all updated documentation.
analysis.recommendationNoIndexar: This document is almost identical to an existing one. Adding it to the corpus would create duplication.
analysis.recommendationRevisar: Differences were detected that could cause contradictory answers. Verify which version is correct.
analysis.recommendationIndexar: The document adds value and can be confidently added to the corpus.
analysis.quickContradictionsDesc: At least {count} possible contradictions with other corpus documents were detected. These have not been verified with double-checking.
analysis.quickExhaustivePrompt: Run the deep analysis to verify all of them with double-checking.
analysis.reanalyzeStyleTitle: Re-analyze only the style of the current text
analysis.reanalyzeAllTitle: Re-analyze contradictions and duplicates against the corpus
analysis.fragmentNotFound: This fragment is no longer in the text (you may have edited it).

improvement.title: Improvement Mode
improvement.problemsDetected: {count, plural, one {# issue detected} other {# issues detected}}
improvement.discardConfirm: Discard changes and close? The original file will be deleted.
improvement.existingDocDescSuffix: is already indexed. What do you want to do with the corrected version?
improvement.keepBothDesc: Indexed as a new document with suffix "(corrected …)".
improvement.replaceOriginalDesc: Replaces the existing document keeping the same name.
improvement.duplicateMissingRef: This duplicate has no reference fragment. Check it manually.
improvement.duplicateNotFound: The duplicate fragment was not found in the text. It may have been deleted.
improvement.problemDismissedPersist: Issue dismissed: "{title}". It won't appear in future re-analyses.
improvement.problemRestoredPersist: Issue restored: "{title}". It will be checked again in the next re-analysis.
improvement.reanalyzeFailed: Could not re-analyze, try again in a few seconds.

billing.title: Billing
billing.userLimit: {count, plural, one {Up to # user} other {Up to # users}}
billing.canceledBanner: Your subscription is canceled. You have access until {date}.
billing.expiredBanner: Your subscription has expired. Subscribe to a plan to keep using the app.
billing.rechargeDesc: Extra credits don't expire and are used when plan credits run out.
billing.dangerZoneDesc: Permanently deletes all documents, embeddings, connections and workspace data. Usage and feedback records are anonymized. This action cannot be undone.
billing.purgeConfirmPrompt: Enter your email ({email}) to confirm deletion:
billing.vatNote: Prices exclude VAT. 21% VAT will be applied on the invoice.
billing.contactNote: More than 50 users or custom volume?
billing.successPlan: Plan subscribed successfully. Credits are now available.

team.title: Team
team.maxUsersReached: You have reached your plan's user limit.
team.upgradeToAdd: Upgrade your plan to add more members.
team.removeConfirm: Remove this member from the team?
team.shareLink: Share this link with the invited person:
team.adminOnlyMsg: Only administrators can invite or remove members.

usage.title: Document Intelligence Dashboard
usage.adminOnly: Only administrators can view the usage breakdown.
usage.upsellDesc: The "Quality Analysis" and "Chat Usage" tabs are available on the Business plan.
usage.noQualityData: No analyses recorded in the last {days} days.
usage.noChatData: No queries recorded in the last {days} days.
usage.coverageDesc: % of each document's fragments used as source in answers. Click to view fragments.
usage.lowCoverage: Low coverage — most of the content is not used in answers.
usage.noFragsUsed: No fragments used in this period.
usage.neverUsedDesc: Never appeared as a source in an answer. Consider reviewing or removing them.

agent.title: AI Agent
agent.paywallDesc: The autonomous AI Agent is available from the Business+ plan.
agent.taskPlaceholder: Describe the objective for the agent…
agent.hint: ⌘ + Enter to send · The agent only uses your documentation
agent.emptyHint: Select a task from the list or describe a new goal below.
agent.paywallBody: The agent follows your documentation's instructions and drafts or processes content for you, always citing sources.
agent.featureEmail: Drafts emails following your company's tone
agent.featureRead: Reads and summarizes documents following your procedures
agent.featureCite: Cites the sources used in each response
agent.featureAsk: Asks before improvising outside the corpus

invite.title: You've been invited
invite.description: You have received an invitation to join a workspace on Doclity.
invite.warningDocsTitle: Warning: you have documents in your current workspace
invite.warningDocsDetail: By accepting, you will leave your current workspace and lose access to your documents. Documents will not be migrated to the new workspace.
invite.warningNoDocsDetail: By accepting, you will leave your current workspace to join the new one.

login.successRegister: Account created! Check your email to confirm.
login.successReset: Check your email to reset your password.

errors.termsRequired: You must accept the terms of service.

login.termsText: I have read and accept the
login.switchToLoginFull: Already have an account? Sign in
login.switchToRegisterFull: Don't have an account? Sign up
login.securityNote: Your documents are secure and only accessible to your organization
login.successCreate: Account created. Check your email to confirm (or sign in if confirmation is disabled).

cookies.message: We use cookies to improve your experience. By continuing, you accept our
cookies.bannerMessage: This site only uses technical cookies necessary for the service to function.

feedback.thanks: Thank you! We'll take it into account 💚
feedback.title: Tell us what you think
feedback.subtitle: Your message helps us improve the app
feedback.placeholderFull: What's missing? What gave you trouble? What would you do differently?
feedback.error: Could not send. Please try again.

landing.heroSubtitle: Detect contradictions, eliminate duplicates and answer questions about your documentation with AI.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need to manage your documentation
